name: FOCAL FIBROCARTILAGINOUS DYSPLASIA OF TIBIA

demographics.Histo: dense hypocellular fibrous tissue resembling tendon with lacuna formation

discriminating_features: well-defined elliptic obliquely oriented lucent defect in medial tibial metadiaphyseal cortex
sclerosis along lateral border of lesion

general: well-defined elliptic obliquely oriented lucent defect in medial tibial metadiaphyseal cortex
sclerosis along lateral border of lesion
